FlowDefinition.description:
Auto Assign Permissions (NOT CURRENTLY USED - Permissions on Profile 16/10/2025)
This flow makes sure that active users on the profiles Back Office External, Lease Management, System Administrator get assigned to the Bank Account Full Access permission set.
User's who are updated to fall outside of the above parameters get removed from the permission set assignments.
FlowDefinition.masterLabel: Prodigy - Auto - Manage Bank Account Permission Assignments
